Ana sayfaya dön

Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2026

1. General Information

AileCo ('we') values the security and privacy of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we use personal data collected through the AileCo mobile application ('App').

2. Collected Data

We collect the following personal data when you use the App:

  • Account information: Name, surname, email address, phone number
  • Profile information: Profile photo, bio, contact information
  • Usage data: App usage statistics and logs
  • Device information: Device type, operating system, unique device ID
  • Location data: Only with user consent and when necessary for relevant features

3. Use of Data

We use your personal data for the following purposes:

  • Account creation and authentication
  • Providing core app functions
  • SmartChain product tracking and V-Card management
  • Improving user experience
  • Providing support and communication
  • Fulfilling legal obligations

4. Data Sharing

We do not share your personal data with third parties except:

  • With user's explicit consent
  • With service providers (cloud storage, analytics services)
  • For legal requirements
  • For rights and asset protection

5. Data Security

We take industry-standard security measures to protect your personal data: encryption, security protocols, access controls, and regular security audits. However, no data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

6. User Rights

You have the following rights:

  • Request access to your data
  • Correct or update your data
  • Delete your data ('Right to be forgotten')
  • Restrict data processing
  • Data portability
  • Withdraw consent

To exercise these rights, email destek@aileco.com

7. Children's Privacy

Our App does not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13. If we discover we have collected such data, we will take immediate steps to delete it.

8. Cookies and Similar Technologies

We may use cookies and similar technologies in the App. These technologies are used to improve user experience and measure app performance.

9. Changes to Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post changes here and notify you of significant changes. We recommend reviewing the policy regularly.

10. Contact

For questions about privacy policy:

E-posta: destek@aileco.com
Web sitesi: https://aileco.com

© 2026 AileCo. All rights reserved.
